callGraph.callee:
[
							file.path,
							file.oldPath ?? "",
							file.status,
							file.additions,
							file.deletions,
							"binary",
							collapsed ? "1" : "0",
							getAnnotationsVersion(annotations),
						].join

[
					query.dataUpdatedAt,
					file.path,
					file.oldPath ?? "",
					file.status,
					file.additions,
					file.deletions,
					collapsed ? "1" : "0",
					getAnnotationsVersion(annotations),
				].join

[
					"c",
					side,
					annotation.lineNumber,
					m.startLine,
					m.endLine,
					m.startSide,
					m.endSide,
				].join

[
				"t",
				side,
				annotation.lineNumber,
				m.threadId,
				m.isResolved ? "1" : "0",
				m.isOutdated ? "1" : "0",
				m.comments.length,
			].join

functions.name: useDiffCodeViewScroll
params:
{
	codeViewRef,
	data,
	fileByItemId,
	items,
	collapsedSet,
	setCollapsed,
}

functions.name: useDiffPaneSearch
params:
{
	containerRef,
	codeViewRef,
	items,
	fileByItemId,
	collapsedSet,
	setCollapsed,
	isActive,
	paneId,
}

functions.name: LinkTierMapper
params:
{
	title,
	description,
	value,
	onChange,
	idPrefix,
	surface,
}
